assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/me happy path returns 200 with tickets array for an authenticated user
assertionResults.title: returns 200 with tickets array for an authenticated user

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/me happy path returns 200 with empty array when the caller has no active tickets
assertionResults.title: returns 200 with empty array when the caller has no active tickets

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/me happy path returns 200 for anonymous callers (empty array)
assertionResults.title: returns 200 for anonymous callers (empty array)

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/me happy path returns estimatedWaitSeconds = 0 when queue not found (defensive fallback)
assertionResults.title: returns estimatedWaitSeconds = 0 when queue not found (defensive fallback)

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/:queueId/status happy path returns 200 with queue info, waitingCount, and estimatedWaitSeconds
assertionResults.title: returns 200 with queue info, waitingCount, and estimatedWaitSeconds

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/:queueId/status happy path is publicly accessible — no auth required
assertionResults.title: is publicly accessible — no auth required

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/:queueId/status happy path returns estimatedWaitSeconds = 0 when waitingCount is 0
assertionResults.title: returns estimatedWaitSeconds = 0 when waitingCount is 0

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/:queueId/status happy path uses fallback ETA (120 s/ticket) when avg_service_seconds is 0
assertionResults.title: uses fallback ETA (120 s/ticket) when avg_service_seconds is 0

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/:queueId/status errors returns 404 when the queue does not exist
assertionResults.title: returns 404 when the queue does not exist

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/:queueId/status errors returns 422 when queueId param is not a valid UUID
assertionResults.title: returns 422 when queueId param is not a valid UUID

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/current happy path returns 200 with queue status by query param
assertionResults.title: returns 200 with queue status by query param

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/current happy path is publicly accessible — no auth required
assertionResults.title: is publicly accessible — no auth required

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/current validation returns 422 when queueId query param is missing
assertionResults.title: returns 422 when queueId query param is missing

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/current validation returns 422 when queueId is not a valid UUID
assertionResults.title: returns 422 when queueId is not a valid UUID

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/v1/queue/current errors returns 404 when the queue does not exist
assertionResults.title: returns 404 when the queue does not exist

assertionResults.fullName: response contract success responses always have { success: true, data: ... }
assertionResults.title: success responses always have { success: true, data: ... }

assertionResults.fullName: response contract error responses always have { success: false, error: { code, message } }
assertionResults.title: error responses always have { success: false, error: { code, message } }

assertionResults.fullName: response contract invalid token returns 401 with UNAUTHORIZED code
assertionResults.title: invalid token returns 401 with UNAUTHORIZED code

assertionResults.fullName: response contract sets Content-Type application/json on success
assertionResults.title: sets Content-Type application/json on success
